title: What is Fine-Tuning? Your Ultimate Guide to Tailoring AI Models in 2025
summary: Discover the power of fine-tuning in AI. Learn how it transforms models like GPT for specific tasks, understand its process and applications — and weigh its pros and cons. Artykuł What is Fine-Tuning? Your Ultimate Guide to Tailoring AI Models in 2025 pochodzi z serwisu DLabs.AI .
author: Shemmy Majewski
